name: Three-Tier Autonomy Portfolio
summary: Production agent estate is split deliberately across three autonomy tiers (typical 60-80% fully autonomous / 15-25% supervised / 5-15% human-led with agent assist) with quarterly recalibration as confidence accumulates per process class.
rejected_reason: Process/governance framework — not an AI agent pattern. incident-response-runbook is an org incident runbook; model-card is a documentation artifact; review-bottleneck-migration is an org staffing concern; three-tier-autonomy-portfolio is portfolio-governance allocation across an agent estate. None describe what an agent does, exhibits, or is architecturally. Rejected during 2026-05-23 catalog audit applying strict AI agent pattern language scope (see PR #21).
